name: Migration Help

labels: ['migration-help']

---

**Note: Please check the [Migration Guides](https://github.com/jilimb0/tgwrapper/tree/main/docs) and [Migration Starter Example](https://github.com/jilimb0/tgwrapper/tree/main/examples/migration-starter) first!**

### Current Stack
- **Source Library:** (Telegraf / grammY / python-telegram-bot / other)
- **State management:** (e.g. In-memory session, custom Redis session, MongoDB)
- **Target environment:** (e.g. Node.js on VPS, Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda)

### What are you trying to port?
Describe the feature or code block you are trying to port.

### Code Snippets
Include the original code block and your attempt at porting it to TGWrapper.

#### Original Code (before)
```typescript
// paste old code here
```

#### Attempted TGWrapper Code (after)
```typescript
// paste new code here
```

### Errors or Blocker Details
Provide any stack traces, compiler errors, or wrong behavior details.
